AddSectionItem.displayName: Add an item to a section

parameters.name: ETag
parameters.description: The value of the @microsoft.graph.sectionsVersion annotation returned when you list sections, or the @odata.etag value from any previously retrieved section. Required for optimistic concurrency control.

parameters.name: Item ID
parameters.description: The conversation ID of the chat, channel, meeting, or community to add to the section. For community items, the service automatically normalizes the ID to the 19:{id}@EngageCommunity format.

returns.raw:
An item (chat, channel, meeting, or community) within a teamwork section

parameters.name: Subject
parameters.description: The text of the event's subject line

parameters.name: Required attendees
parameters.description: Required attendees for the event separated by semicolons

parameters.name: Optional attendees
parameters.description: Optional attendees for the event separated by semicolons

parameters.name: display name
parameters.description: The name associated with the location

parameters.name: Importance
parameters.description: The importance of the event: low, normal or high

parameters.name: Recurrence pattern
parameters.description: Pattern for the recurrence. Required when meeting is a recurrence

parameters.name: Recurrence interval
parameters.description: The number of units between occurrences, where units can be in days, weeks, months, or years, depending on the type. Required when meeting is a recurrence

parameters.name: Week Index
parameters.description: Specifies on which day of the week the event occurs. Default is first

parameters.name: Recurrence start date
parameters.description: Start date of the recurrence, format YYYY-MM-DD. Required when meeting is a recurrence

parameters.name: Recurrence end date
parameters.description: End date of the recurrence, format YYYY-MM-DD

parameters.name: All day event
parameters.description: Set to true if the event lasts all day

parameters.name: Pre-event reminder time
parameters.description: The number of minutes before the event start time that the reminder alert occurs

parameters.name: Enable reminders
parameters.description: Set to true if an alert is set to remind the user of the event

parameters.name: Status show as
parameters.description: Status to show during the event

parameters.name: Request response
parameters.description: Set to true if the sender would like a response when the event is accepted

returns.raw:
Response for new meeting that was created
- Body
- NewMeetingRespone
